name: ux-heuristics
description: Evaluate and improve interface usability using heuristic analysis. Use when the user mentions "usability audit", "UX review", "users are confused", "heuristic evaluation", "form usability", "navigation problems", "Nielsen heuristics", "cognitive walkthrough", "usability testing", "is this easy to use", "find usability problems", or "people get lost in our app". Also trigger when reviewing a design for usability issues, improving form-completion rates, or evaluating information architecture and n
author: wondelai
